allies.rationale_text: Scientific-method-evidence-testing helps time-tested-validation distinguish real proof from polished plausibility by forcing explicit checks against evidence.
Auditability-traceability helps time-tested-validation keep its proof surface inspectable through named checks, expected answers, and verifiable logic.

antagonists.rationale_text: False-precision-avoidance resists time-tested-validation when old confidence rituals are mistaken for real evidence instead of being checked for present fit.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Time-tested-validation conflicts with first-principles-thinking when deference to historical precedent prevents ground-up re-derivation that would reveal changed conditions.
structured_tensions.source_quote: time-tested-validation conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when deference to historical precedent prevents ground-up re-derivation that would reveal changed conditions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Time-tested-validation conflicts with red-queen-effect when time-tested solutions are outpaced by competitive adaptation that makes historical validation obsolete.
structured_tensions.source_quote: time-tested-validation conflicts with red-queen-effect (Red Queen effect) when time-tested solutions are outpaced by competitive adaptation that makes historical validation obsolete.

curation_notes.summary: The relation surface stays on proof-oriented allies rather than expanding into broad tradition or anti-innovation rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not create synthetic tension blocks because the raw source is stronger on allied validation mechanisms than on explicit named conflicts.
open_questions: The antagonist remains interpretive because the raw source is more explicit on weak validation habits than on one clean current-vocabulary opponent.
